mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending power, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 60% of triggered instances or signal loses predictive power (t-stat < 1.5) in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and construction activity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to outperform individual series or produces negative returns in > 50% of co-expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during late-cycle phases or 5-day forward returns show no statistical edge (p > 0.10) in backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index growth above 3.5 percent triggers expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity markets rally despite high inflation readings or the signal fails to predict negative returns in > 55% of threshold crossings.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirm broad-based labor market strength, supporting corporate earnings expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields negative forward returns in > 50% of observations or interaction term loses significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic output and corporate revenue potential, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDP growth series shows zero correlation with 60-day equity returns or predictive accuracy falls below random chance in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained drop in the index of industrial production below 98.0 signals severe manufacturing contraction and supply chain bottlenecks, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Market returns remain positive in > 60% of threshold breaches or the signal fails to maintain a negative directional bias in out-of-sample periods.
